title: 10 best herbal creams for cold sore
description: St John's Wort creams helps with cold sore because it contains hyperforin, a compound that has potent antiviral properties. When applied topically to the affected area, this cream can help reduce the severity and duration of cold sore symptoms. The cream's anti-inflammatory and antioxidant actions also soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and swelling.
